{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Manager",
  "description": "Mopheth Pharmacy is a leading retail pharmacy and wellness brand in Lagos, offering quality pharmaceuticals, healthcare products, groceries, beauty items, and everyday essentials. With multiple outlets and a strong focus on customer care, innovation, and affordability, we are committed to improving lives and delivering exceptional retail experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Description


	The Marketing Manager is responsible for developing and executing strategic marketing plans to drive brand visibility, customer engagement, and revenue growth across all business units.
	The role oversees digital marketing, brand management, campaigns, market research, and customer insights while ensuring consistent brand messaging and effective coordination with sales, operations, and product teams.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Planning &amp; Execution:


	Develop and implement marketing strategies aligned with business goals.
	Plan, coordinate, and execute marketing campaigns across digital and offline platforms.
	Prepare annual/quarterly marketing budgets and ensure cost efficiency.


Brand &amp; Content Management:


	Strengthen and maintain brand identity across all customer touchpoints.
	Oversee creation of marketing content, promotional materials, and product campaigns.
	Manage social media presence and ensure consistent brand messaging.


Customer &amp; Market Insights:


	Conduct market research to identify new opportunities, customer trends, and competitor activities.
	Analyze campaign performance and prepare weekly/monthly reports.
	Recommend improvements to enhance customer acquisition and retention.


Sales &amp; Revenue Support:


	Collaborate closely with sales teams to support lead generation and conversion.
	Drive promotional activities to support product launches, seasonal sales, and special events.


Team Leadership &amp; Collaboration:


	Supervise and guide the marketing team, vendors, and creative partners.
	Work with internal departments (Operations, Sales, Logistics, HR, Customer Service) to align marketing with business needs.


Digital Marketing:


	Manage SEO, SEM, email marketing, social media ads, and online engagement.
	Monitor analytics and ensure optimal performance of digital channels.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrbp@mophethgroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketing Manager Job at Mopheth Pharmacy




        
    

        
        Mopheth Pharmacy is a leading retail pharmacy and wellness brand in Lagos, offering quality pharmaceuticals, healthcare products, groceries, beauty items, and everyday essentials. With multiple outlets and a strong focus on customer care, innovation, and affordability, we are committed to improving lives and delivering exceptional retail experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Marketing Manager is responsible for developing and executing strategic marketing plans to drive brand visibility, customer engagement, and revenue growth across all business units.
	The role oversees digital marketing, brand management, campaigns, market research, and customer insights while ensuring consistent brand messaging and effective coordination with sales, operations, and product teams.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Planning & Execution:


	Develop and implement marketing strategies aligned with business goals.
	Plan, coordinate, and execute marketing campaigns across digital and offline platforms.
	Prepare annual/quarterly marketing budgets and ensure cost efficiency.


Brand & Content Management:


	Strengthen and maintain brand identity across all customer touchpoints.
	Oversee creation of marketing content, promotional materials, and product campaigns.
	Manage social media presence and ensure consistent brand messaging.


Customer & Market Insights:


	Conduct market research to identify new opportunities, customer trends, and competitor activities.
	Analyze campaign performance and prepare weekly/monthly reports.
	Recommend improvements to enhance customer acquisition and retention.


Sales & Revenue Support:


	Collaborate closely with sales teams to support lead generation and conversion.
	Drive promotional activities to support product launches, seasonal sales, and special events.


Team Leadership & Collaboration:


	Supervise and guide the marketing team, vendors, and creative partners.
	Work with internal departments (Operations, Sales, Logistics, HR, Customer Service) to align marketing with business needs.


Digital Marketing:


	Manage SEO, SEM, email marketing, social media ads, and online engagement.
	Monitor analytics and ensure optimal performance of digital channels.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Locum Client Relations Officer",
  "description": "Integrated Health Care Limited is a limited liability company incorporated to carry out the business of health management services. The company with RC No 372504 was incorporated in 2000 by the Corporate Affairs Commission, Abuja under the Companies and Allied Matters Act, 1990. Our over 21 years experience and a skilled workforce have positioned us as HMO of choice as we have consistently delivered quality health care services to our clients all over the Country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Locum Client Relations Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	A first degree in Business Administration, Health Sciences, Marketing and other related fields.


Work Experience:


	0-2 years of experience in customer service, preferably in a healthcare or insurance setting.


Core Competencies:


	Customer service orientation
	Conflict resolution and problem-solving
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Teamwork and collaboration
	Empathy and professionalism
	Organizational and time management skills


Industry Knowledge (Desirable):


	Knowledge of HMO operations and healthcare systems is an added advantage.


Benefits


	Competitive salary with attractive benefits.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers.abuja@yahoo.com&nbsp;using &quot;Client Relations Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Locum Client Relations Officer Job at Integrated Health Care Limited




        
    

        
        Integrated Health Care Limited is a limited liability company incorporated to carry out the business of health management services. The company with RC No 372504 was incorporated in 2000 by the Corporate Affairs Commission, Abuja under the Companies and Allied Matters Act, 1990. Our over 21 years experience and a skilled workforce have positioned us as HMO of choice as we have consistently delivered quality health care services to our clients all over the Country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Locum Client Relations Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
Educational Qualification:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A first degree in Business Administration, Health Sciences, Marketing and other related fields.


Work Experience:


	0-2 years of experience in customer service, preferably in a healthcare or insurance setting.


Core Competencies:


	Customer service orientation
	Conflict resolution and problem-solving
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Teamwork and collaboration
	Empathy and professionalism
	Organizational and time management skills


Industry Knowledge (Desirable):


	Knowledge of HMO operations and healthcare systems is an added advantage.


Benefits


	Competitive salary with attractive benefits.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Client Relations Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "IT Manager",
  "description": "Brands Optimal Limited is a leading experiential marketing agency. We are one of Africa&rsquo;s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;

Brands Optimal Limited is one of Africa&rsquo;s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.


	Brands Optimal Limited is one of Africa&rsquo;s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.


Job Summary


	The IT Manager will be responsible for overseeing the company&rsquo;s IT strategy, infrastructure, systems security, policy &amp; procedures development, implementation &amp; ensuring compliance as well as technological innovation initiatives.
	The ideal candidate will provide leadership in planning, implementing, managing, and maintaining IT systems that support business growth and operational excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement the company&rsquo;s IT strategy aligned with business objectives.
	Oversee IT infrastructure, email software, networks, servers, cloud systems, and enterprise applications.
	Ensure data security, cybersecurity compliance, and risk management on all relevant technology assets across the organization.
	Lead technological transformation initiatives and technology innovation projects.
	Manage relevant IT vendor relationships and manage all IT related assets within the organization.
	Ensure data recovery and data backup systems are effective.
	Provide strategic guidance to the management on technology investments and utilization.
	Oversee system upgrades, software deployment, and hardware procurement.
	Ensure IT policies, procedures, and compliance standards are maintained.
	Educate staff members on the IT policies and procedures, drive implementation &amp; consistent compliance with said policies, as they align with relevant technological &amp; data protection laws.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field (Master&rsquo;s degree is an added advantage).
	Minimum of 3 years of progressive IT experience.
	Strong knowledge of network administration, cybersecurity, cloud technologies, and enterprise systems.
	Experience managing IT infrastructure in a fast-paced corporate environment.
	Professional certifications (e.g., ITIL, PMP, CISSP, Microsoft certification, or similar) are an advantage.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
	Strong problem-solving and strategic thinking abilities.


Competencies:


	Strategic and analytical mindset
	High level of integrity and accountability
	Strong project management skills
	Ability to manage multiple priorities under pressure
	Excellent team leadership and collaboration skills.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits
	Professional development and career growth opportunities
	Dynamic and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@brandsoptimal.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

IT Manager Job at Brands Optimal Limited




        
    

        
        Brands Optimal Limited is a leading experiential marketing agency. We are one of Africa’s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 

Brands Optimal Limited is one of Africa’s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Brands Optimal Limited is one of Africa’s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.


Job Summary


	The IT Manager will be responsible for overseeing the company’s IT strategy, infrastructure, systems security, policy & procedures development, implementation & ensuring compliance as well as technological innovation initiatives.
	The ideal candidate will provide leadership in planning, implementing, managing, and maintaining IT systems that support business growth and operational excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement the company’s IT strategy aligned with business objectives.
	Oversee IT infrastructure, email software, networks, servers, cloud systems, and enterprise applications.
	Ensure data security, cybersecurity compliance, and risk management on all relevant technology assets across the organization.
	Lead technological transformation initiatives and technology innovation projects.
	Manage relevant IT vendor relationships and manage all IT related assets within the organization.
	Ensure data recovery and data backup systems are effective.
	Provide strategic guidance to the management on technology investments and utilization.
	Oversee system upgrades, software deployment, and hardware procurement.
	Ensure IT policies, procedures, and compliance standards are maintained.
	Educate staff members on the IT policies and procedures, drive implementation & consistent compliance with said policies, as they align with relevant technological & data protection laws.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field (Master’s degree is an added advantage).
	Minimum of 3 years of progressive IT experience.
	Strong knowledge of network administration, cybersecurity, cloud technologies, and enterprise systems.
	Experience managing IT infrastructure in a fast-paced corporate environment.
	Professional certifications (e.g., ITIL, PMP, CISSP, Microsoft certification, or similar) are an advantage.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
	Strong problem-solving and strategic thinking abilities.


Competencies:


	Strategic and analytical mindset
	High level of integrity and accountability
	Strong project management skills
	Ability to manage multiple priorities under pressure
	Excellent team leadership and collaboration skills.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits
	Professional development and career growth opportunities
	Dynamic and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Job Position: Farm Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Osun
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Agriculture / Farming

Description


	Our client is seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Farm Accountant to manage financial records, budget planning, and reporting for farm operations.
	The ideal candidate will ensure accurate accounting practices, timely reporting, and compliance with financial regulations to support smooth farm operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records for the farm.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Monitor cash flow, manage expenses, and handle payroll.
	Support budgeting, cost analysis, and financial forecasting.
	Ensure compliance with relevant accounting and regulatory standards.


Person Specifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree (BSc) in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in accounting; agricultural experience is an advantage.
	Proficient in accounting software and Microsoft Office.
	High attention to detail and strong analytical skills.


Salary
N150,000 &ndash; N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;talentsearch@firstexcelsia.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Farm Accountant&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Farm Accountant Job at First Excelsia Professional Services




        
    

        
        First Excelsia Professional Services - Our client is recruiting suiable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Farm Accountant

Job Location: Osun
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Agriculture / Farming

Description


	Our client is seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Farm Accountant to manage financial records, budget planning, and reporting for farm operations.
	The ideal candidate will ensure accurate accounting practices, timely reporting, and compliance with financial regulations to support smooth farm operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain accurate financial records for the farm.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Monitor cash flow, manage expenses, and handle payroll.
	Support budgeting, cost analysis, and financial forecasting.
	Ensure compliance with relevant accounting and regulatory standards.


Person Specifications


	Bachelor’s Degree (BSc) in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in accounting; agricultural experience is an advantage.
	Proficient in accounting software and Microsoft Office.
	High attention to detail and strong analytical skills.


Salary
N150,000 – N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using “Farm Accountant” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
